data.title: Tokenized Real Estate In 2025: What Investors Should Watch
data.description: Insights on real estate tokenization, its growing relevance today, and key factors which investors should watch.

data.title: Richtech Robotics: Transition To RaaS To Drive Accelerating Demand For Robotics, Says Bullish Analyst
data.description: Richtech Robotics (NASDAQ: RR) offers attractive opportunity to invest in rising demand for service robotics, according to analyst Scott Buck. Buy rating and $3.50 price target. RaaS model and improving financial performance make it a strong buy.

data.title: What's Going On With Google Parent Alphabet Stock On Friday?
data.description: Google reached a deal with GSA to lower federal government costs for its products and services, including a temporary 71% discount for Workspace until 2025. It also expanded pricing for its GCP services and added AI features.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Fears Tariffs Could Cut Off His Swiss Watch Supply. 'Don't Take My Watches Away From Me—That Would Be Crazy!'
Stock Of The Day: Is The Stage Set For A Wells Fargo Rally?
data.description: Shares of Wells Fargo (WFC) are trading at a support level. There is a good chance that they begin to trend higher.
